info.name: Soracom Inventory API
info.description: LwM2M-based device management for Soracom Inventory including object models, devices, resources, observe/notify, and remote execution.

request.description: Executes a resource of a device

query.description: Whether or not to add model information

request.description: Triggers observation of the specified resource of a device. Once observation is started, the server will be notified when there is a change in value on the device side.

item.name: Retrieves data sent from an Inventory device to Harvest Data

query.description: Start time of the target period (UNIX time in milliseconds).
End time of the target period (UNIX time in milliseconds).
Sort order of data entries. Either descending order (latest data entry first) or ascending order (oldest data entry first).
Maximum number of data entries to retrieve (1 to 1000). The default is `10`.
Timestamp of the last data entry retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, the list starting from the next data entry can be obtained.

variable.description: (Required) ID of the Inventory device from which to retrieve data. The ID of an Inventory device can be obtained using the [Device:listDevices API](#!/Device/listDevices).

request.description: Retrieves data that matches the specified conditions from the data sent by the specified Inventory device to Harvest Data. If the data entries do not fit in one page, a URL to retrieve the next page with the same conditions will be included in the `link` header of the response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Start time of the target period (UNIX time in milliseconds).
End time of the target period (UNIX time in milliseconds).
Sort order of data entries. Either descending order (latest data entry first) or ascending order (oldest data entry first).
Maximum number of data entries to retrieve (1 to 1000). The default is `10`.
Timestamp of the last data entry retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, the list starting from the next data entry can be obtained.
